title: ARCSubmissionArtifact
description: Schema for an ARC-AGI submission artifact produced by ARCSubmissionOrchestrator.

taskId.description: Identifier derived from the task file stem (e.g. SAMPLE-0001).

candidateGrid.description: Proposed output grid — a 2-D array of non-negative integers (ARC color values 0–9).

latencyMs.description: Wall-clock milliseconds from orchestrator entry to artifact construction.

ttl.description: Unix epoch seconds at which this submission expires (typically now + 300).

witnessSha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical JSON encoding of candidateGrid. Used to detect post-hoc tampering.
